resources.string: Notification-sending permission is required. Tap to open settings.
To work, SpeakUPI needs notification-reading permissions. To grant it, tap the button below, find and select \"SpeakUPI\" on the next screen, then select \"Allow notification access\".
Notification-reading permission is required. Tap to open settings.
SpeakUPI may be stopped in the background if battery usage is restricted. Tap below and set battery usage to Unrestricted for better reliability with the screen off.
Optional extra message to read after the received amount
Keeping services active for faster announcement reliability.
